testcase.name: test_create_visit_persists_commercial

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf849a6bdd480>('commercial_actions') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf849a6bdd480> = {'ai_extraction': {'barriers': [], 'commercial_actions': {'boost_discussed': True, 'demo_booked': True, 'demo_booked_date': '2026-01-20', 'demo_completed': False, ...}, 'market_signals': [], 'opportunity_state': 'Unknown', ...}, 'confirmed_barriers': [], 'confirmed_topics': ['TEST_topic'], 'created_at': '2026-04-28T06:25:33.155945+00:00', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_commercial_and_control_tower.py:188: in test_create_visit_persists_commercial assert visit.get("commercial_actions") E AssertionError: assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf849a6bdd480>('commercial_actions') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf849a6bdd480> = {'ai_extraction': {'barriers': [], 'commercial_actions': {'boost_discussed': True, 'demo_booked': True, 'demo_booked_date': '2026-01-20', 'demo_completed': False, ...}, 'market_signals': [], 'opportunity_state': 'Unknown', ...}, 'confirmed_barriers': [], 'confirmed_topics': ['TEST_topic'], 'created_at': '2026-04-28T06:25:33.155945+00:00', ...}.get
